eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL DANGER WARNING for the following counties or areas: Winona, MN; at 8:00 AM on OCT 12, 2019 Effective until 4:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System by the WInona County Sheriffs Office,  This is only a test. This is a test of EAS by the WInona County Sheriffs Office,  This is only a test.
